/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/My3DGame.dir/src/Cube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/My3DGame.dir/src/Level.cpp.o CMakeFiles/My3DGame.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o My3DGame   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib ../engine/libEngine.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib
